name: sceneport
description: Safe Unity Editor MCP bridge for Codex and other MCP clients.

interface.shortDescription: Safe MCP bridge into the Unity Editor.
interface.longDescription: ScenePort lets Codex inspect, safely operate, and playtest a live Unity Editor through MCP tools for scene hierarchy, selection, console logs, GameObject creation, transform edits, components, serialized properties, assets, tests, play mode, screenshots, playtest reports, resources, and prompts.
